title: Realistic Rain Mod
description: With Realistic Rain, rain above the height 192 is not rendered.
body:
This mod makes rain invisible above altitude 192 because in real life rain comes from clouds, hence realistic rain.

Github Repository: [Click here](https://github.com/therohero/realistic-rain)

My Github Account: [Click here](https://github.com/therohero)

Please give me a star on the repository and Follow me on Github
